sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46989" key="h(mero/drus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερό-δρῡς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n46989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nut-gall oak, Quercus infectoria</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
